name: @reactfast/tables
description: Declarative data tables for React — columns, actions, pagination, sorting, search

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && pnpm build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && pnpm build && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && pnpm build && npm publish --access public

author: Jonathon McClendon
